title: Software Update - DFU - Animations on Software Update screen
scenario: Software Update screen animations fail to slide in correctly during firmware update flow on headset
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Navigate to Home → Device Settings → [Device Name].
Open the Software Update tab and tap Update.
Observe the transition animation for the Three Easy Steps screen.
Observe the transition animation and the animated picture in the center of the Updating screen.
expected: 1) Software Update screen slides in from the right. 2) Three Easy Steps screen slides in from the right. 3) Software Update screen slides in from the left. 4) Updating screen slides in from the right with an animated picture in the center.
